title: Supertech is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Supertech is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Supertech has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supertech:
Supertech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
